name: @pm/bench-runner
description: The ADR-0001 comparison engine as a tool (issue #7): a Playwright bench runner driving composed-origin URLs under the three published test profiles (applied at the automation layer via CDP), cold/warm as separate columns, median-of-N batches, bucketed compressed KB with /_pm/* instrumentation stripped, decomposed TTFB, web-vitals harvested from the injected chrome's own beacons (intercepted — lab traffic never reaches the RUM collector), and SHA-pinned receipts with a one-command reproduce. Dev/CI only — never shipped. Deliberately has no `test` script (@pm/origin-suite precedent): the runner is proven at the composed-origin seam by suite/bench.browser.test.ts.
